name: alice-zhao-portfolio-ui-animation-agents
purpose: Project-local roles, subagents, and skills for expert UI and animation work on the Alice Zhao portfolio, especially the dashboard-only avatar eye tracking effect.

subagents.name: Visual QA And Browser Verification Agent
Code Quality And Release Readiness Reviewer

defaultWorkflow: Confirm Next.js 16 and static export boundaries.
Map the existing homepage scroll and dashboard activation state.
Composite and calibrate the new avatar eye assets.
Implement pointer tracking only after the dashboard is ready.
Review accessibility, reduced motion, touch, and keyboard impact.
Verify the rendered result in desktop and mobile browser states.
Run release checks and separate new issues from known baseline issues.
baselineNotes: This is a Next.js 16.2.4 static export App Router site.
The avatar eye effect belongs in the homepage Client Component layer.
The new assets are public/img/aboutMe/alice_transparent.png, alice_left_eye.png, and alice_right_eye.png.
The effect should activate only when the interactive dashboard area is present.
Reduced motion and coarse pointer users should receive a static avatar state.
